comment: Synthetic Stage IV cutaneous melanoma, 82F, ECOG 2, BRAF V600E confirmed by NGS. 1L received dabrafenib+trametinib (visceral-crisis biology) with progression at 11 mo — IO-naive at 2L. Age 82 + ECOG 2 + baseline limited-cutaneous psoriasis make ipi+nivo Grade 3-4 irAE risk (~50%) prohibitive. KB DRIFT NOTE: plan anchor was '1L nivolumab+relatlimab fixed-dose (RELATIVITY-047)' but at this KB baseline the only nivo+rela indication is IND-MELANOMA-2L-RELATLIMAB-NIVOLUMAB scoped to line_of_therapy=2 IO-naive post-BRAFi (RELATIVITY-047 was 1L per FDA; KB positions it as 2L IO-alternative for ipi-frail patients, off-label per indication notes). Case modeled at 2L accordingly. Engine routes ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-2L step 1 (KIT absent) → step 2 (RF-MELANOMA-IO-RESISTANT absent — IO-naive) → step 4 (RF-MELANOMA-BRAF-V600-ACTIONABLE fires) → step 41 (free-text ipi+nivo unfit — falls through) → step 5 (RF-MELANOMA-FRAILTY-AGE fires age≥80 + ECOG≥2) → IND-MELANOMA-2L-RELATLIMAB-NIVOLUMAB. UA access caveat: relatlimab unregistered — named-patient import pathway required.
